calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 P1 target fix: max_hazard_field_view
items.notes: SD-029 P1 training fix: target changed from harm_signal (R2 ceiling 0.576 < gate 0.75, impossible) to max(hazard_field_view) (ceiling 0.798 > gate 0.65). Injection interval 5->20, prob 1.0->0.5.
